features: NATURAL INGREDIENTS - This collagen face mask is formulated with natural ingredients, it's gentle, non-irritating and moisturizing for quick skin hydration. Collagen face mask completely safe for all skin types.Deep collagen anti wrinkle lifting mask is expertly formulated to deeply moisturize the skin's surface and penetrate into the deeper layers, promoting a healthy and hydrated complexion.

DEEP HYDRATION - The collagen mask overnight has a better hydrating effect than ordinary hyaluronic acid. Collagen face masks quickly moisturizes the skin's surface and penetrates deep into the skin to create hydrated complexion. Korean collagen face mask deep mask focus on a balance of active ingredients and long-lasting results that go beyond temporary effects.

PORE TIGHTENING & FIRMING - Ultra-low molecular collagen overnight face mask maximizes skin penetration and absorption. Collagen face mask can refines enlarged pores, improves skin elasticity instantly after application and visibly smooths out the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles.

LONG-LASTING CARE - Collagen face mask set focus on the balance of effective ingredients and long-lasting results beyond temporary effects. Our Collagen korean face mask focus on a balance of active ingredients and long-lasting results, it is the ultimate solution for achieving a youthful look.

RADIANCE BOOST - The face masks skincare sheet masks is injected with nicotinamide to refresh and restore tired and dull skin, revitalize tired skin, improve skin luster, and make it glow healthy and young.Enhanced with hyaluronic Acid, our collagen sheet mask boosts absorption, effectively improving moisture levels and elasticity for a revitalized complexion.
description: Product Description Revitalize While You Sleep: Collagen Overnight Face Mask - Enhance the Look of Your Skin! Wake Up to Youthful Radiance, Night After Night The Formula Of Overnight Renewal: Our Advanced Formula Combines Nourishing Ingredients To Work Synergistically As You Sleep. Key Benefits at a Glance Deep Hydration Boost Lock in moisture for 72-hour dewy suppleness. Age-Defying Power Minimize fine lines and boost collagen production. Skin Rebound Effect Restore elasticity for a firmer, bouncy complexion. Non-Greasy Comfort Lightweight collagen essence absorbs instantly, no pillow residue. Collagen Protein Penetrates deeper to plump skin structure, smoothing wrinkles from within. Niacinamide (Vitamin B3) Brightens tone, shrinks pores, and strengthens skin's moisture barrier. Hyaluronic Acid Complex Holds 1000x its weight in water for intense, lasting hydration. Glycerin Shield Technology Creates an invisible moisture-locking veil against nighttime dryness. Nighttime Ritual, Morning Transformation Prep: Cleanse face and apply toner. Treat: Apply the mask onyour face evenly. Dream: Let the mask work its magic for 6-8 hours. Glow: Rinse in AM to reveal baby-soft, luminous skin. Pro Tip: Use 3x weekly for 28 days to see visible reduction in crow's feet and nasolabial folds.
